target_sources.name: arXiv
target_sources.notes: Use primary paper pages when possible.

target_sources.name: Hugging Face
target_sources.notes: Record license, maintainer, intended use, and update date when available.
target_sources.use_for: model cards, dataset cards, Spaces, paper linkage

target_sources.name: GitHub/GitLab
target_sources.notes: Treat as official only when tied to authors, maintainers, packages, or papers.

target_sources.name: OpenReview
target_sources.notes: Use public venue records when available.

target_sources.name: Semantic Scholar/OpenAlex/Crossref
target_sources.notes: Discovery only unless primary source unavailable.

target_sources.name: Official library docs
target_sources.notes: Best when paired with repo and release tag.

target_sources.name: Package registries
target_sources.notes: Use PyPI, conda-forge, npm, crates.io, Maven, NuGet, Docker Hub, ROS Index as relevant.

target_sources.name: NumFOCUS/project ecosystems
target_sources.notes: Follow through to official project docs.

target_sources.name: University/lab/faculty pages
target_sources.notes: Weight higher when PI/lab-maintained and linked to artifacts.
target_sources.use_for: lab context, project context, publication lists

target_sources.name: Graduate course notes
target_sources.notes: Not current research consensus by default.

target_sources.name: Theses/dissertations
target_sources.notes: Mark peer-review status; verify important claims.

target_sources.name: OSF/Zenodo/Dataverse/CORE/OATD
target_sources.use_for: research artifacts, datasets, theses, open records
